name: Jiangsu Huaxicun Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Huaxicun Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells chemical fiber in China and internationally. It also provides asset management, investment consulting, merger and acquisition, and private equity and corporate shares trust investment services. In addition, the company is involved in banking business. It also operates approximately 170 branches in Shanghai, Zhejiang, Jiangsu, Fujian, Guangdong, Chongqing, Sichuan, Jiangxi, and Yunnan provinces. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Jiangyin, China.
